title: Lightweight Adventures
description: Adventure modpack with a good balance between content and performance.
body:
Lightweight Adventures is a fabric modpack, it has lots of content while keeping peformance.

**New Features**
                                                                                                                                                            
.New structures and dungeons                                                                                                                                                                                                          
.Magic                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
.Cool armour                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
.Better combat                                                                                                
.Overhauled spiders and creepers                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
.New furniture                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          
.Shaders                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
.Temperature mechanic                                                                                                
.Various quality of life features                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
.Rpg elements
.Fresh animation                                                                                             
.Backpacks           

**HOW DO I DOWNLOAD LIGHTWEIGHT ADVENTURES?**                                                                                        
If you have the modrinth launcher you can simply download lightweight adventures from the "browse" section in the app. If you dont have modrinth launcher you can use MultiMC, Prism Launcher or ATLauncher.

4-8 gigabytes of ram allocated to your game is reccomended

**Shaders**                                                    
                                                                 
Shaders are not preinstalled so here are some good options:     
                                                           
[MakeUp - Ultra Fast (if ur computer sux)](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders)                                  
 [Photon](https://modrinth.com/shader/photon-shader)               
 [Bliss](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader)              
 [Solas](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader)              
 [Rethinking voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)
